Automatically claims pending FLETCH first."}},"notice":"GRAZE is the flagship yield aggregator vault for Locksley Protocol.         Users deposit LP tokens and earn FLETCH rewards.         Rewards are minted by this vault and distributed to stakers.         Users claim their pending FLETCH by calling claimFLETCH().         Fee structure:           - Performance fee: 10% of harvested yield \u2192 sent to YEW treasury           - Withdrawal fee: 0.5% of withdrawn LP \u2192 sent to YEW treasury         Reward math (MasterChef-style):           - accFLETCHPerShare accumulates per second based on rewardRate           - pendingFLETCH[user] = shares[user] \u00d7 accFLETCHPerShare \u2212 userRewardDebt[user]           - User's debt is updated on every params.amount: Amount of LP tokens to deposit.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

params._rate: FLETCH per second (e.g. 1e18 = 1 FLETCH/sec across all stakers).

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

params.sharesToRedeem: Number of shares to redeem (1:1 with LP).

accFLETCHPerShare().notice: Accumulated FLETCH per share (multiplied by 1e12 for precision)

claimFLETCH().notice: Claim pending FLETCH rewards without touching your deposit.

deposit(uint256).notice: Deposit LP tokens. Automatically claims pending FLETCH first.

emergencyWithdrawLPs(address,uint256).notice: Emergency: rescue LP tokens sent directly to the vault.         Should only be used in emergencies.

getPendingFLETCH(address).notice: Returns pending FLETCH rewards for a user.

harvest().notice: Harvest and compound rewards. Callable by anyone (keeper/public).         10% performance fee is sent to YEW treasury.

rewardDebt(address).notice: Reward debt — used to calculate pending rewards correctly

rewardRate().notice: FLETCH per second distributed (in wei). Set by owner after launch.

setRewardRate(uint256).notice: Set the FLETCH reward rate per second (wei).         Called by owner after launch to start emissions.

withdraw(uint256).notice: Withdraw LP tokens. Automatically claims pending FLETCH first.
